'''fosapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:meadlike|meadlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meadlike|meadlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fosapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fosapithi|fosapithi]] || [[word:fosapiji|fosapiji]] || [[word:fosapishi|fosapishi]] || [[word:fosapiki|fosapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fosaputhuthu|fosaputhuthu]] || [[word:fosapujuju|fosapujuju]] || [[word:fosapushushu|fosapushushu]] || [[word:fosapukuku|fosapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fosaputhu|fosaputhu]] || [[word:fosapuju|fosapuju]] || [[word:fosapushu|fosapushu]] || [[word:fosapuku|fosapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fosapufthuf|fosapufthuf]] || [[word:fosapufjuf|fosapufjuf]] || [[word:fosapufshuf|fosapufshuf]] || [[word:fosapufkuf|fosapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fosapethe|fosapethe]] || [[word:fosapeje|fosapeje]] || [[word:fosapeshe|fosapeshe]] || [[word:fosapeke|fosapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fosapothotho|fosapothotho]] || [[word:fosapojojo|fosapojojo]] || [[word:fosaposhosho|fosaposhosho]] || [[word:fosapokoko|fosapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fosapotho|fosapotho]] || [[word:fosapojo|fosapojo]] || [[word:fosaposho|fosaposho]] || [[word:fosapoko|fosapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fosapofthof|fosapofthof]] || [[word:fosapofjof|fosapofjof]] || [[word:fosapofshof|fosapofshof]] || [[word:fosapofkof|fosapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfthÃŸf|fosapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfjÃŸf|fosapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfshÃŸf|fosapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfkÃŸf|fosapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fosapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fosapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fosapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fosapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfthÃŸf|fosapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfjÃŸf|fosapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfshÃŸf|fosapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfkÃŸf|fosapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfthÃŸf|fosapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfjÃŸf|fosapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfshÃŸf|fosapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fosapÃŸfkÃŸf|fosapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fosapÃḊthÃḊ|fosapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fosapÃḊjÃḊ|fosapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fosapÃḊshÃḊ|fosapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fosapÃḊkÃḊ|fosapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fosapathatha|fosapathatha]] || [[word:fosapajaja|fosapajaja]] || [[word:fosapashasha|fosapashasha]] || [[word:fosapakaka|fosapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fosapatha|fosapatha]] || [[word:fosapaja|fosapaja]] || [[word:fosapasha|fosapasha]] || [[word:fosapaka|fosapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fosapafthaf|fosapafthaf]] || [[word:fosapafjaf|fosapafjaf]] || [[word:fosapafshaf|fosapafshaf]] || [[word:fosapafkaf|fosapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fosapasha|fosapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fosapshÃḋsha|fosapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fosaprosha|fosaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fosapmusha|fosapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fosapyasha|fosapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofosapnkshÃḋsha|gofosapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofosapnkrosha|gofosapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofosapnkmusha|gofosapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofosapnkyasha|gofosapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fosasapasha|fosasapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fosasapshÃḋsha|fosasapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fosasaprosha|fosasaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fosasapmusha|fosasapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fosasapyasha|fosasapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofosasapnkshÃḋsha|gofosasapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofosasapnkrosha|gofosasapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofosasapnkmusha|gofosasapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofosasapnkyasha|gofosasapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fesÃḊpasha|fesÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fesÃḊpshÃḋsha|fesÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fesÃḊprosha|fesÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fesÃḊpmusha|fesÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fesÃḊpyasha|fesÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofesÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gofesÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofesÃḊpnkrosha|gofesÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofesÃḊpnkmusha|gofesÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofesÃḊpnkyasha|gofesÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fosfapasha|fosfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fosfapshÃḋsha|fosfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fosfaprosha|fosfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fosfapmusha|fosfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fosfapyasha|fosfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofosfapnkshÃḋsha|gofosfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofosfapnkrosha|gofosfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofosfapnkmusha|gofosfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofosfapnkyasha|gofosfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
